name: Hammer Metals Limited
description: Hammer Metals Limited is an Australian mineral exploration company focused on discovering large-scale copper-gold deposits in the Mount Isa district of Northwest Queensland and gold-nickel-copper deposits in the Yandal Belt of Western Australia. The company holds a strategic tenement position in the Mount Isa province, one of the world's most significant base metal provinces, where it actively explores for Iron Oxide Copper Gold (IOCG) and other copper-gold mineralisation styles.
